groups:
May the Force be with you
- Obi Wan

I am your father
- Vader

Do or do not there is no try
- Yoda
I have a bad feeling about this
The Force is strong with this one

Never tell me the odds
- Han Solo
I find your lack of faith disturbing
Help me Obi Wan you're my only hope - Leia

It's a trap!
- Ackbar
The Force will be with you always
In my experience there's no luck
Stay on target stay on target

This is the way
- Mandalorian
I've got a bad feeling about this - Han
Your focus determines your reality -QuiGon
Luminous beings are we not this crude - Yoda
So this is how liberty dies with applause
Let the past die kill it if you have to

Judge me by my size do you?
- Yoda

I know
- Han Solo
